text:
I have updated x11-drivers/xf86-video-vmware with a fix from a VMware
developer for the 'disappearing cursor' bug. (There is also a VT switching
bug with xdm, but this fixes the disappearing cursor bug.)

A patch is attached.

Fix: A patch is attached.
